headline: BlackLine Stock Down Nearly 30% as One Fund Cuts Stake by $10 Million
summary: BlackLine delivers cloud-based automation tools for enterprise finance teams, serving a global client base with a subscription SaaS model.

headline: Sotera Health Up 30% This Past Year, so Why Did One Fund Sell $4 Million in Shares?
